title: Niedenzuella mater-dei

As a member of Melastomataceae, Niedenzuella mater-dei is part of the order Myrtales and the clade Rosidae. intro: Niedenzuella mater-dei, also known as the "Mother of God" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae.
